name: pet-workspace
description: Locally generated Windows 11 pixel desktop pet.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:protocol && pnpm --filter @pet/protocol typecheck && pnpm --filter @pet/desktop typecheck
scripts.test:generator: D:/Anaconda/envs/pet-core/python.exe -m unittest discover -s services/generator/tests -t services/generator -p test_*.py -v
scripts.test: pnpm test:desktop && pnpm test:generator && pnpm test:protocol && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:assets && pnpm test:trace
